name: HMCS Ontario (53)
events: The page dealing with the wartime history of HMCS Ontario was created in June 2023.
26 Apr 1945 At 1200 B/26, at her builders yard in Belfast, Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) is commissioned for trials. (1)
16 May 1945 Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted D/G trials off Belfast. (1)
17 May 1945 Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted trials off Belfast. (1)
19 May 1945 Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted gunnery trials off Belfast. (1)
20 May 1945 Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted cruising trials off Belfast. (1)
26 May 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) was accepted from the shipyard and then proceeded from Belfast to Greenock. (1)
29 May 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted trials / exercises in the Clyde area. (1)
2 Jun 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted trials / exercises in the Clyde area. (1)
11 Jun 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted torpedo firing exercises in the Clyde area. (1)
13 Jun 1945 Around 2015 B/13, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) departed Greenock for Liverpool (Birkenhead) where she arrived the following afternoon. (1)
15 Jun 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) is docked in No.3 Graving Dock at Birkenhead. (1)
17 Jun 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) is undocked. She departed for Scapa Flow late in the evening. (1)
19 Jun 1945 Around 0615 B/19, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) arrived at Scapa Flow from Liverpool. (1)
24 Jun 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted RIX (range and inclination) and close range AA gunnery exercises off Scapa Flow. (1)
27 Jun 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted RIX (range and inclination) at Scapa Flow during which ORP Garland (Kmdr.ppor. (Cdr.) acted as target.
These were followed by A/S exercises with HMS Truncheon (A/Lt.Cdr. R.J. Clutterbuck, DSO, RN). HMCS Ontario then returned to Scapa Flow for speed trials on the measured mile and gunnery exercises.
29 Jun 1945 Around 0700 B/29, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) departed Scapa Flow for Liverpool. (1)
30 Jun 1945 Around 0730 B/30, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) arrived at Liverpool from Scapa Flow. There a pom-pom director was embarked.
Around 1130 B/30, she left for Greenock where she arrived around 2115 B/30. (1)
2 Jul 1945 Around 2100 B/2, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) departed Greenock for the Mediterranean where she was to continue her work-up programme. (1)
8 Jul 1945 Around 0830 B/8, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) arrived at Malta from Greenock. (1)
11 Jul 1945 During the night of 11/12 July 1945, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted exercises off Malta. (1)
12 Jul 1945 During 12/13 July 1945, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted exercises off Malta. (1)
14 Jul 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted underway refuelling exercises off Malta. (1)
17 Jul 1945 During 17/18 July 1945, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted exercises off Malta. (1)
19 Jul 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted exercises, including gunnery, off Malta. (1)

20 Jul 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted exercises off Malta. These included radar calibration exercises, underway towing exercises with HMS Bicester (Cdr. R.W.F. Northcott, DSO, RN), underway refuelling exercises with HMS Chiddingfold (A/Lt.Cdr. F.G. Woods, DSC, RN) and torpedo firing exercises. (1)
23 Jul 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted exercises, including gunnery, off Malta. (1)
24 Jul 1945 During 24/25 July 1945, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted exercises off Malta. (1)
26 Jul 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted gunnery and torpedo firing exercises off Malta. (1)
2 Aug 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted gunnery and torpedo firing exercises off Malta. (1)
3 Aug 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted gunnery exercises off Malta on completion of which course was set for Alexandria via Ras El-Kanayis. (1)
5 Aug 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted bombardment exercises off Ras El-Kanayis. (1)
6 Aug 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted bombardment exercises off Ras El-Kanayis on completion of which she proceeded to Alexandria. (1)
9 Aug 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted gunnery exercises off Alexandria on completion of which course was set for Port Said where she was to enter the Suez Canal. (1)

10 Aug 1945 HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) transited the Suez Canal southbound and then set course for Aden. HMS Bicester (Cdr. R.W.F. Northcott, DSO, RN) and HMS Chiddingfold (A/Lt.Cdr. F.G. Woods, DSC, RN) joined during the passage to Aden. (1)

14 Aug 1945 Around 0630 C/14, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN), HMS Bicester (Cdr. R.W.F. Northcott, DSO, RN), underway refuelling exercises with HMS Chiddingfold (A/Lt.Cdr. F.G. Woods, DSC, RN) arrived at Aden from Suez. En-route to Aden exercises had been carried out.
Around 1600 C/14, HMCS Ontario departed Aden for Colombo. (1)
19 Aug 1945 Around 0700 FG/19, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) arrived at Colombo from Aden. (1)
21 Aug 1945 Around 1630 FG/21, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) departed Colombo for Trincomalee. On leaving Colombo gunnery exercises were carried out. (1)
22 Aug 1945 Around 1200 FG/22, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) arrived at Trincomalee from Colombo. (1)
31 Aug 1945 In the morning, HMCS Ontario (Capt. H.T.W. Grant, DSO, RCN) conducted D/G trials off Trincomalee.
Around 1525 FG/31, she departed Trincomalee as part of a convoy bound for Hong Kong with troops, stores and relief goods. (1)
